author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: chore: enable workspaces on packages (algolia/react-instantsearch#1095)
body:
* chore: move packages to Workspaces

* chore: remove & rename boot for bootstrap

* chore: move devDependencies on top level package

* chore(eslint): use multi packages directory

* chore(rollup): exclude both node_modules

* fix(Netlify): install all the dependencies

* chore(bootstrap): clean only ignored files

* chore: move specific devDependencies on packages

* chore(jest): use projects option

* fix(jest): provide --projects option

* chore(bundlesize): move dependency on packages

* chore(babel): move dependencies on packages
